<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the HTTP request DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/httpreq/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "httpreq"
  dnsCredentials:
    # HTTPREQ_ENDPOINT: The URL of the server
    endpoint: ""
    # HTTPREQ_MODE: `RAW`, none
    mode: ""
    # HTTPREQ_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # HTTPREQ_PASSWORD: Basic authentication password
    password: ""
    # HTTPREQ_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # HTTPREQ_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # HTTPREQ_USERNAME: Basic authentication username
    username: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
